features.title: Fix UI Dark Mode & Verify
features.description: Fix unreadable text in dark mode by ensuring NativeWind is correctly configured (Babel, Tailwind) and verify the fix.

features.title: Document-Style Inline Typing Chat
features.description: Replace traditional textbox with inline document-style typing (like Word/Google Docs). User types directly in the chat flow, press Enter to send. Update AI settings to temp=1.0, max_tokens=16k.
